title: Origins: Elixan
body:
# ⚗️ Elixan
![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115b0db10a5b85ce6bcf3e03089c582c617e0b3c.png)
### (Impact 2)
_The Elixans live in crystal sanctuaries hidden underground, where they create potions that can change matter, mind, or soul._

Found underground in circles around cauldrons, they all dance across the line of life and death.

![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115b0db10a5b85ce6bcf3e03089c582c617e0b3c.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/gQa1HiERfPo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Powerlist
![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115b0db10a5b85ce6bcf3e03089c582c617e0b3c.png)

<details>
<summary>Efficient Brewing</summary>

You may easily brew awkward potions by combining glass bottles and flint in your inventory.

- You can then add more ingredients to these awkward potions to make vanilla potions easier; the ingredients will include tooltips. You start your adventure with nine bottles and nine flint.
- You're capable of crafting custom potions using cauldrons. To do this you must first make a Base. Right-clicking a water-filled cauldron with Glowstone Dust in your main hand and a Glass Bottle in your off-hand creates this. You can add more ingredients to the Alchemical Base. The ingredient tooltips differ from the vanilla ones.

</details>

<details>
<summary>On the Go</summary>

You have a way to store materials while on the go, but unlike most species with extra inventory, you can directly reach your ender-chest.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Chemicals of War</summary>

When fighting, you like it when your opponents are under effects. You do 40% less damage to creatures unaffected by negative affects, but 20% more damage to those who are.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Bare Formula</summary>

You have 20% less armour than the other players.

</details>

### Dependencies
![bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/115b0db10a5b85ce6bcf3e03089c582c617e0b3c.png)
This datapack does require the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins).

### Additional
This origin was created for a friend. It may be very random, but my motivation was waning, so I had to finish it quickly; apologies if the showcase is bad and hurried. This is also an update of an older private origin that I had.

Updates are coming up with more custom potions on the way. Custom potion suggestions are always welcome if you offer them via Discord!
